configurations.name: sportgear
runtimeArgs: $root='D:\kitwebsite\sportgear-finder'; $l=New-Object Net.HttpListener; $l.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:3456/'); $l.Start(); Write-Host 'ready'; while($l.IsListening){ $cx=$l.GetContext(); $url=$cx.Request.Url.AbsolutePath; if($url -eq '/'){$url='/index.html'}; $fp=Join-Path $root ($url.TrimStart('/').Replace('/','\')); if(Test-Path -LiteralPath $fp -PathType Leaf){ $bytes=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($fp); $cx.Response.ContentLength64=$bytes.LongLength; $cx.Response.OutputStream.Write($bytes,0,$bytes.Length); } else { $cx.Response.StatusCode=404 }; $cx.Response.OutputStream.Flush(); $cx.Response.Close() }
